message:
feat(db): expose sender_id in search result rows

Add sender_id field to SearchRow, SearchRowWithProject, and
GlobalSearchRow structs. Update all SQL SELECT statements
(run_like_fallback, run_like_fallback_product, run_like_fallback_global)
to include m.sender_id and shift column index extraction accordingly in
search_messages. This enables downstream consumers to resolve sender
identity without an additional query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
